examples: Her skin was flawless and seemed opalescent.
Opalescent hand dyed fabrics add sparkle to your design.
These two properties make opalescent film an obvious material for currency.
The grand entrance features a spectacular wall of opalescent, shimmering shells, cascading into beautiful shapes and pearlized, intricate designs.
In his office, when Kendall looked up from his Tocqueville, he could see the opalescent lake spreading out in all directions.
